title: Audify
description: iOS app to convert PDF books to high-quality audio using Google TTS and Exa Search.

title: Graphit
description: A graph editor built from scratch. Turns natural language into interactive charts and diagrams instantly.

title: Sonoveo
description: realtime audio visualization using stable diffusion 1.5 and hubert audio encodings.

title: Umari
description: The fastest web agent in the world. Uses a novel architecture for browser automation that outperforms existing approaches.

title: Samantha
description: A Playwright wrapper for Meta's Segment Anything Model that removes the 29-second limit by chunking and stitching audio.

title: Deducer
description: Reasoning from first principles. An attempt to ground LLM responses in formal logic and authoritative sources.

title: Browser Challenge Agent
description: DOM-based browser automation agent that solves 30 challenges in under 5 minutes using Gemini 2.5 Flash.

title: UCSD Transcript
description: Extracts transcripts from UCSD lecture videos for AI chat and studying.

title: SiteScroll
description: Random website discovery tool. Personal sites are wonderful fragments of someone's identity but not easily discoverable.

title: X Bookmarks Chat
description: AI-powered chat interface for your X/Twitter bookmarks.

title: Noise Tetris
description: Tetris but the blocks have visual noise.
